name: my-translate
title: My Translate
description: Translate selected text or manual input between Chinese and English.
author: liam5566

preferences.name: primaryLanguage
preferences.title: Primary Language
preferences.description: Your main language. Text not in this language will be translated into it.

preferences.name: secondaryLanguage
preferences.title: Secondary Language
preferences.description: Translate primary language text into this language, and vice versa.

preferences.name: speakSelectionRate
preferences.title: Speak Selection Speed
preferences.description: Playback speed for the Speak Selection command.

preferences.name: speechMode
preferences.title: Speech Mode
preferences.description: Choose when translated text should be spoken automatically.

commands.name: instant-translate-copy
commands.title: Instant Translate Copy
commands.subtitle: My Translate
commands.description: Translate selected text and copy the result to clipboard.

commands.name: instant-translate-paste
commands.title: Instant Translate Paste
commands.subtitle: My Translate
commands.description: Translate selected text and paste the result in place.

commands.name: instant-translate-view
commands.title: Instant Translate View
commands.subtitle: My Translate
commands.description: Translate selected text and show the result as a floating HUD overlay.

commands.name: open-text-translation
commands.title: Open Text Translation
commands.subtitle: Open translation with the current selection
commands.description: Capture selected text from the frontmost app and open Text Translation with it.

commands.name: translate-text
commands.title: Text Translation
commands.subtitle: Translate selected text or typed input
commands.description: Translate selected text or manual input with automatic language direction detection.

commands.name: speak-selection
commands.title: Speak Selection
commands.subtitle: My Translate
commands.description: Read the highlighted text aloud in the secondary language.

commands.name: recent-vocabulary
commands.title: Recent Vocabulary
commands.subtitle: Recently translated words and phrases
commands.description: Review the words and phrases you translated most recently.

commands.name: frequent-vocabulary
commands.title: Frequent Vocabulary
commands.subtitle: Your most frequently translated words
commands.description: Review the words and phrases you translate most often.
